qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_recurso as ID, t.c_recurso as CODE, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec as VALUE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy
FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as t, PRY01_PROYS_REC, PRY01_PROYS_REQ, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Recursos.RECURSO\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL
JOIN t.oi_recurso LEFT OUTER SEC.id , pry01_proys_rec.oi_proy_req INNER pry01_proys_req.oi_proy_req, pry01_proys_rec.oi_recurso INNER t.oi_recurso, t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal
WHERE PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID}
ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_recurso as ID, t.c_recurso as CODE, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec as VALUE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as t, PRY01_PROYS_REC, PRY01_PROYS_REQ, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Recursos.RECURSO\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN t.oi_recurso LEFT OUTER SEC.id , pry01_proys_rec.oi_proy_req INNER pry01_proys_req.oi_proy_req, pry01_proys_rec.oi_recurso INNER t.oi_recurso, t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE t.c_recurso={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND PRY01_PROYS_REQ.oi_proyecto={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_proyecto} AND PRY01_PROYS_REQ.oi_perfil={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_perfil}
ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_recurso as ID, t.c_recurso as CODE, PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_proy_rec as VALUE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, SEC.policy
FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as t, PRY01_PROYS_REC, PRY01_PROYS_REQ,
NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Recursos.RECURSO\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL
JOIN t.oi_recurso LEFT OUTER SEC.id , pry01_proys_rec.oi_proy_req INNER pry01_proys_req.oi_proy_req, pry01_proys_rec.oi_recurso INNER t.oi_recurso, t.oi_recurso INNER PRY01_PROYS_REC.oi_recurso, t.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal
WHERE PRY01_PROYS_REQ.oi_proyecto={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_proyecto} AND PRY01_PROYS_REQ.oi_perfil={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_perfil}
ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
